# FRA-BER LAVA INTERNI B AROMA 5L Intensive Detergent For Fabrics

https://www.gecegy.com/shop/fra-ber-lava-interni-b-aroma-italian-intensive-detergent-for-fabrics-5l-5303
https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.template/5303/image_1920?unique=cc6d512

#### Description:

LAVA INTERNI B AROMA is an advanced, intensive detergent designed to deep-clean fabric and textile surfaces in vehicles. Powered by enzyme-based technology, it doesn’t just clean—it compacts fabric fibers, removes organic dirt, and neutralizes unpleasant odors at the source. The result? Fabrics that are cleaner, fresher, and dry faster.
Whether used in detailing centers or for personal car care, this detergent leaves behind a lasting fresh aroma that enhances the customer experience.

#### Key Features:

- Deep and immediate cleaning of automotive fabrics

- Enzyme-powered formula breaks down organic residues

- Long-lasting cleanliness and odor elimination

- Quick-drying effect to speed up service times

- Fresh, clean scent that impresses customers

- Ideal for seats, carpets, door panels, and more

#### Dilution:

- 
Sprayer use: 1:25 – 1:50
Storage tip: Store above 5°C. Do not mix with algaecides or bactericides.
